score_range_label.en: Moderate (50-69) — Lowest End, Three Overnight Hits
score_range_label.zh: 中等确信度 (50-69) — 最低端，昨夜三重打击

position_advice.en: 50% (Reduced from 56% — Meta beat-and-drop, FOMC 8-4 split, oil $108 surge)
position_advice.zh: 50%（从 56% 减仓——Meta beat and drop，FOMC 8-4 分裂，油价暴涨至 $108）

summary.en: Liquidity conditions deteriorated overnight. FOMC voted 8-4 to hold rates — the biggest dissent split of 2026, signaling deep internal disagreement. Warsh (5/15 incoming Fed Chair) confirmed plans for significant QT. Oil surged $11 in one week (WTI $97→$108, Brent $102→$112) — Hormuz risk premium. 30Y at 4.987%, approaching 5% for the first time since 2007. The TGA deceleration story remains intact (TGA $1.007T, growth rate halved), but the FOMC split and oil shock have added new headwinds that override the near-term positive.
summary.zh: 流动性状况昨夜恶化。FOMC 以 8-4 投票维持利率不变——2026 年最大分裂，显示内部深度分歧。Warsh（5/15 上任的美联储主席）确认大幅缩表计划。油价一周暴涨 $11（WTI $97→$108，Brent $102→$112）——Hormuz 风险溢价。30Y 4.987%，即将突破 5%（2007 年以来首次）。TGA 减速故事仍然完整（TGA $1.007T，增速减半），但 FOMC 分裂和油价冲击增加了新逆风，盖过了近期正面因素。

fed_balance_sheet_change.en: +$1.7B (WoW) — nearly flat; FOMC 8-4 split; Warsh 5/15 QT confirmed
fed_balance_sheet_change.zh: +17 亿美元（周环比）——接近持平；FOMC 8-4 分裂；Warsh 5/15 缩表确认

rrp_note.en: Effectively zero — no liquidity buffer remaining
rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——无流动性缓冲

tga_note.en: +$82.7B WoW — growth rate halved from +$227B; peak signal confirmed; seasonal unwind expected in 3-4 weeks
tga_note.zh: 周环比 +827 亿美元——增速从 +2270 亿美元减半；见顶信号明确；预计 3-4 周内季节性回落

net_liquidity_change.en: -$82B (WoW) / -$388B (3-week) — FOMC 8-4 split + oil $108 + 30Y approaching 5% add new headwinds
net_liquidity_change.zh: -820 亿美元（周环比）/ -3880 亿美元（三周）——FOMC 8-4 分裂 + 油价 $108 + 30Y 接近 5% 增加新逆风

details.en: Three overnight hits changed the picture. (1) Meta beat revenue but missed user count, capex below expectations — stock down 5% after-hours. Beat-and-drop has now spread to Mag 5. (2) FOMC voted 8-4 to hold — the 4 dissents are the largest split of 2026, signaling Warsh's incoming QT agenda has already fractured the committee. (3) Oil surged: WTI $108, Brent $112 — one week gain of $11. Iran Hormuz situation unresolved. 30Y at 4.987% approaching 5% for first time since 2007. The positive: Alphabet +81% net income monster beat, Microsoft +29%, Amazon beat — AI generates real revenue. Today's focus: Q1 GDP (8:30am ET) and tonight's Apple/Amazon results.
details.zh: 昨夜三重打击改变了格局。(1) Meta 收入超预期但用户数 miss，capex 低于预期——盘后跌 5%。Beat and drop 已扩散到 Mag 5。(2) FOMC 以 8-4 投票维持——4 票反对是 2026 年最大分裂，显示 Warsh 即将到来的缩表议程已经分裂委员会。(3) 油价暴涨：WTI $108，Brent $112——一周涨 $11。伊朗 Hormuz 局势未解决。30Y 4.987% 即将突破 5%（2007 年以来首次）。正面因素：Alphabet 净利润 +81% monster beat，Microsoft +29%，Amazon beat——AI 产生真实收入。今日焦点：Q1 GDP（美东时间上午 8:30）和今晚 Apple/Amazon 结果。

status.en: Tightening — FOMC 8-4 Split + Oil $108 + Warsh QT Confirmed
status.zh: 紧缩——FOMC 8-4 分裂 + 油价 $108 + Warsh 缩表确认

reason.en: Score dropped from 48 to 42. Three new headwinds overnight: (1) FOMC 8-4 split — the 4 dissents signal Warsh's QT agenda has already fractured the committee before he takes over 5/15. (2) Oil WTI $108 (+$11 in one week) — compresses margins, limits rate cut space, pushes inflation expectations higher. (3) 30Y at 4.987% approaching 5% — if it breaks 5%, triggers institutional rebalancing and is a 2007-level signal. TGA deceleration story intact but overshadowed by these new headwinds.
reason.zh: 分数从 48 降至 42。昨夜三个新逆风：(1) FOMC 8-4 分裂——4 票反对显示 Warsh 的缩表议程在他 5/15 接任前已经分裂委员会。(2) 油价 WTI $108（一周 +$11）——压缩利润率，限制降息空间，推高通胀预期。(3) 30Y 4.987% 接近 5%——如果突破 5%，触发机构再平衡，是 2007 年级别的信号。TGA 减速故事完整但被这些新逆风盖过。

status.en: Strong but Splitting — Alphabet Monster Beat vs Meta Beat-and-Drop
status.zh: 强劲但分化——Alphabet Monster Beat vs Meta Beat and Drop

reason.en: Score up from 70 to 72. The positives are real: Alphabet net income +81% ($34.5B vs $19.1B), EPS $5.11 monster beat. Microsoft revenue $54.5B +29%. Amazon beat. Beat rate 84%, average beat magnitude 12.3% (2x long-term average). Q1 tracking +15.1% YoY. AI generates real revenue — this is confirmed. But Meta beat revenue, missed user count, capex below expectations — stock -5% after-hours. Beat-and-drop has now spread to Mag 5. The split between semiconductor/cloud (beating and rallying) vs everything else (beating and dropping) is widening. Tonight: Apple and Amazon are the final test.
reason.zh: 分数从 70 升至 72。正面因素是真实的：Alphabet 净利润 +81%（$345 亿 vs $191 亿），EPS $5.11 monster beat。Microsoft 收入 $545 亿 +29%。Amazon beat。Beat rate 84%，平均超幅 12.3%（长期均值两倍）。Q1 追踪 +15.1% 同比。AI 产生真实收入——已确认。但 Meta 收入超预期，用户数 miss，capex 低于预期——盘后跌 5%。Beat and drop 已扩散到 Mag 5。半导体/云（beat 且涨）vs 其他所有（beat and drop）的分化在扩大。今晚：Apple 和 Amazon 是最终测试。

status.en: Deteriorating — Below 50% on 200DMA, Russell 1000 Pure Growth Only 32%
status.zh: 恶化——不到 50% 在 200 日均线上方，Russell 1000 Pure Growth 仅 32%

reason.en: Score dropped from 48 to 42. Breadth has deteriorated significantly. Fewer than 50% of S&P 500 constituents are above their 200-day moving average. Russell 1000 Pure Growth: only 32% above 200DMA — a stark divergence from index new highs. Defensive rotation confirmed: Utilities +2.48% vs Tech -1.51% on 4/23. Financials YTD -4.23% worst sector. This is a textbook narrow market driven by a handful of mega-cap tech names. The 60% breadth threshold briefly touched on 4/20 has now been decisively broken.
reason.zh: 分数从 48 降至 42。广度显著恶化。不到 50% 的 S&P 500 成分股在 200 日均线上方。Russell 1000 Pure Growth：仅 32% 在 200 日均线上方——与指数新高形成鲜明背离。防御性轮动确认：4/23 公用事业 +2.48% vs 科技 -1.51%。金融 YTD -4.23% 最差板块。这是教科书级由少数大型科技股驱动的窄市场。4/20 短暂触及的 60% 广度门槛现已被决定性突破。

status.en: Hesitating — VIX +5.50%, 30Y Near 5%, Oil $108, Meta After-Hours -5%
status.zh: 犹豫转向警告——VIX +5.50%，30Y 接近 5%，油价 $108，Meta 盘后 -5%

reason.en: Score held at 55. S&P 7,135.95 (-0.04%), Nasdaq 24,673.24 (+0.04%) — essentially flat on 4/29. But VIX surged 5.50% to 18.81 — volatility repricing. 10Y 4.418%, 30Y 4.987% approaching 5%. Oil: WTI $107.95, Brent $111.75 — one-week surge of $11. Meta -5% after-hours. Pre-market futures: S&P +0.32%, Nasdaq +0.79% (Alphabet/Microsoft/Amazon positive reaction), Dow -0.34% (Meta/oil drag). The split between Nasdaq (AI winners) and Dow (broader economy) is widening. Key signal today: if VIX stays above 19 after open, institutional selling pressure is real.
reason.zh: 分数维持 55。S&P 7,135.95（-0.04%），Nasdaq 24,673.24（+0.04%）——4/29 基本持平。但 VIX 暴涨 5.50% 至 18.81——波动率重新定价。10Y 4.418%，30Y 4.987% 接近 5%。油价：WTI $107.95，Brent $111.75——一周暴涨 $11。Meta 盘后 -5%。盘前期货：S&P +0.32%，Nasdaq +0.79%（Alphabet/Microsoft/Amazon 正面反应），Dow -0.34%（Meta/油价拖累）。Nasdaq（AI 赢家）和 Dow（更广泛经济）之间的分化在扩大。今日关键信号：如果 VIX 开盘后维持在 19 以上，机构卖压是真实的。

trading_summary.en:
51.5 — Moderate, lowest end. Three hits overnight: Meta beat-and-drop (-5%), FOMC 8-4 split (biggest dissent of 2026), oil surges $11 to $108/WTI.

Cut to 50% position (-6pts). But don't panic — Alphabet +81% net income is a monster beat proving AI generates real revenue. Microsoft +29%. Amazon beat. The AI infrastructure thesis is validated.

The problem is everything else: Meta's user miss signals peak social media engagement. FOMC 8-4 split means Warsh's QT agenda has already fractured the committee. Oil at $108 is a stagflation risk. 30Y approaching 5% is a 2007-level signal.

Wait for today's GDP and tonight's Apple/Amazon. If Apple beats and rallies, the AI hardware demand story extends. If Apple beat-and-drops, cut to 40%. Preserve capital, wait for clarity.
trading_summary.zh:
51.5 分，Moderate 最低端。昨夜三重打击：Meta beat and drop（-5%），FOMC 8-4 分裂（2026 年最大 dissent），油价暴涨 $11 至 WTI $108。

减仓至 50%（-6 个点）。但不恐慌——Alphabet 净利润 +81% 是 monster beat，证明 AI 产生真实收入。Microsoft +29%。Amazon beat。AI 基础设施主题得到验证。

问题是其他所有：Meta 用户 miss 显示社交媒体参与度见顶。FOMC 8-4 分裂意味着 Warsh 的缩表议程在他接任前已经分裂委员会。油价 $108 是滞胀风险。30Y 接近 5% 是 2007 年级别的信号。

等今天 GDP 和今晚 Apple/Amazon。如果 Apple beat 且上涨，AI 硬件需求故事延续。如果 Apple beat and drop，减仓至 40%。保存资本，等待明确信号。

trading_quote: Three hits overnight. Don't panic, don't chase. Alphabet proved AI revenue is real. But Meta's user miss, FOMC split, and oil at $108 are serious. 50% position. Wait for Apple tonight.

note.en: Essentially flat — pre-market futures +0.32% on Alphabet/Amazon strength
note.zh: 基本持平——盘前期货 +0.32%，受 Alphabet/Amazon 支撑

note.en: Flat — pre-market +0.79%; Alphabet/MSFT/AMZN positive, Meta/NVDA negative
note.zh: 持平——盘前 +0.79%；Alphabet/MSFT/AMZN 正面，Meta/NVDA 负面

note.en: Lagging — pre-market -0.34%; Meta and oil drag on broader economy names
note.zh: 落后——盘前 -0.34%；Meta 和油价拖累更广泛经济股

note.en: Small caps underperforming — breadth concern; only 32% of R1000 Pure Growth above 200DMA
note.zh: 小盘股跑输——广度担忧；Russell 1000 Pure Growth 仅 32% 在 200 日均线上方

note.en: Short end rising — FOMC 8-4 split signals policy uncertainty
note.zh: 短端上升——FOMC 8-4 分裂显示政策不确定性

note.en: Dollar strengthening on FOMC hold + oil inflation fears
note.zh: 美元走强，受 FOMC 维持利率 + 油价通胀担忧支撑

note.en: Pulled back from $4,709 high — safe haven demand offset by dollar strength
note.zh: 从 $4,709 高点回落——避险需求被美元走强抵消

note.en: Surged $11 in one week — Hormuz risk premium; stagflation risk rising
note.zh: 一周暴涨 $11——Hormuz 风险溢价；滞胀风险上升

note.en: Above $110 — compressing margins globally, limiting central bank flexibility
note.zh: 突破 $110——全球压缩利润率，限制央行灵活性

note.en: Down 40% from $126K high — risk-off divergence from equity ATH persists
note.zh: 从 $126K 高点跌 40%——与股市历史新高的风险规避背离持续

note.en: Surging — volatility repricing risk; above 19 triggers institutional auto-selling
note.zh: 上升——波动率重新定价风险；突破 19 触发机构自动减仓

exchange_flow_detail.en: 52-week range: $60,074 – $126,198 | Down 40% from all-time high | Diverging from equity ATH
exchange_flow_detail.zh: 52 周区间：$60,074 – $126,198 | 从历史高点跌 40% | 与股市历史新高背离

analysis.en: BTC $75,744 (-0.99%), down 40% from $126,198 all-time high. Fear & Greed at 48 (neutral-fear). The divergence between BTC (down 40%) and S&P (at ATH) is one of the most notable risk signals in this report. Historically, BTC leads risk-off by 4-6 weeks. Key support: $73,000-$75,000. If FOMC split + oil shock + Meta beat-and-drop triggers broader risk-off, BTC could retest $70,000-$72,000. If Apple beats and rallies tonight, BTC could recover toward $80,000.
analysis.zh: BTC $75,744（-0.99%），从 $126,198 历史高点跌 40%。恐惧贪婪指数 48（中性偏恐惧）。BTC（跌 40%）与 S&P（历史新高）之间的背离是本报告中最显著的风险信号之一。历史上，BTC 领先风险规避 4-6 周。关键支撑：$73,000-$75,000。如果 FOMC 分裂 + 油价冲击 + Meta beat and drop 触发更广泛风险规避，BTC 可能回测 $70,000-$72,000。如果 Apple 今晚 beat 且上涨，BTC 可能回升至 $80,000。

analysis.en: Gold $4,571.00 (+0.21%), pulled back from $4,709 recent high. Dollar strengthening (DXY 98.86) is offsetting safe haven demand. Silver $72.27 (+0.25%) — gold/silver ratio ~63.2. Despite the pullback, the structural bull case remains: FOMC policy uncertainty, Warsh QT risk, oil inflation, geopolitical premium (Hormuz). Gold is likely to find support at $4,500-$4,550 and resume uptrend once dollar stabilizes.
analysis.zh: 黄金 $4,571.00（+0.21%），从近期高点 $4,709 回落。美元走强（DXY 98.86）抵消了避险需求。白银 $72.27（+0.25%）——金银比约 63.2。尽管回落，结构性牛市逻辑仍然完整：FOMC 政策不确定性、Warsh 缩表风险、油价通胀、地缘政治溢价（Hormuz）。黄金可能在 $4,500-$4,550 找到支撑，并在美元稳定后恢复上升趋势。

title.en: Meta Beat-and-Drop + FOMC 8-4 Split — Biggest Dissent of 2026
title.zh: Meta Beat and Drop + FOMC 8-4 分裂——2026 年最大 Dissent

detail.en: Meta beat revenue but missed user count, capex below expectations — stock down 5% after-hours. Beat-and-drop has now spread to Mag 5. Good news not good enough is a 6-month warning signal. FOMC voted 8-4 to hold — the 4 dissents are the largest split of 2026, signaling Warsh's incoming QT agenda has already fractured the committee. Policy uncertainty has gone from manageable to uncontrollable. Warsh takes over 5/15 with plans for significant balance sheet reduction.
detail.zh: Meta 收入超预期但用户数 miss，capex 低于预期——盘后跌 5%。Beat and drop 已扩散到 Mag 5。好消息不够好是 6 个月后坏消息的预警信号。FOMC 以 8-4 投票维持——4 票反对是 2026 年最大分裂，显示 Warsh 即将到来的缩表议程已经分裂委员会。政策不确定性从可控变为不可控。Warsh 5/15 接任，计划大幅缩减资产负债表。

title.en: Oil Surge WTI $108 + 30Y Approaching 5% — Stagflation Risk Rising
title.zh: 油价暴涨 WTI $108 + 30Y 即将破 5%——滞胀风险上升

detail.en: Oil surged $11 in one week (WTI $97→$108, Brent $102→$112) — Iran Hormuz situation unresolved. At $108, oil compresses corporate margins, pushes inflation expectations higher, and limits the Fed's ability to cut rates. 30Y at 4.987% approaching 5% for the first time since 2007 — if it breaks 5%, triggers institutional rebalancing and is a major structural signal. The combination of oil inflation + yield pressure + FOMC split is a challenging macro backdrop.
detail.zh: 油价一周暴涨 $11（WTI $97→$108，Brent $102→$112）——伊朗 Hormuz 局势未解决。$108 的油价压缩企业利润率，推高通胀预期，限制美联储降息能力。30Y 4.987% 即将突破 5%（2007 年以来首次）——如果突破，触发机构再平衡，是重大结构性信号。油价通胀 + 收益率压力 + FOMC 分裂的组合是挑战性的宏观背景。

title.en: Breadth Below 50% + Fintech Collapse + BTC Down 40%
title.zh: 广度不到 50% + Fintech 崩溃 + BTC 跌 40%

detail.en: S&P near ATH but fewer than 50% of constituents above 200DMA. SOFI -15.44%, HOOD -13.23%, LMND -14.85% — fintech/credit stress signals. BTC down 40% from $126K to $75K while equities at ATH — the most notable risk-off divergence. Russell 1000 Pure Growth only 32% above 200DMA. This is not a healthy broad bull market. It's a narrow market driven by Alphabet/Microsoft/Amazon/NVIDIA — and even that group is now splitting (Meta -5%).
detail.zh: S&P 接近历史新高但不到 50% 成分股在 200 日均线上方。SOFI -15.44%，HOOD -13.23%，LMND -14.85%——金融科技/信用压力信号。BTC 从 $126K 跌至 $75K 跌 40%，而股市在历史新高——最显著的风险规避背离。Russell 1000 Pure Growth 仅 32% 在 200 日均线上方。这不是健康的广泛牛市。这是由 Alphabet/Microsoft/Amazon/NVIDIA 驱动的窄市场——而即使这个群体现在也在分裂（Meta -5%）。

title.en: Active — Severe and Multiple. S&P at ATH but <50% Above 200DMA. Meta Beat-and-Drop.
title.zh: 活跃——严重且多重。S&P 在历史新高但不到 50% 在 200 日均线上方。Meta Beat and Drop。

detail.en: Multiple severe divergences: (1) S&P/Nasdaq near ATH but fewer than 50% of constituents above 200DMA — textbook top divergence. (2) VIX 18.81 (+5.50%) rising while indices flat — volatility repricing faster than price. (3) Meta beat revenue but stock -5% after-hours — beat-and-drop spreading to Mag 5. (4) BTC -40% from ATH while equities at ATH — biggest risk-off divergence. (5) 30Y approaching 5% while stock market near ATH — bond market warning. (6) Dow -0.57% while Nasdaq flat — non-confirmation. These divergences cannot coexist indefinitely.
detail.zh: 多重严重背离：(1) S&P/Nasdaq 接近历史新高但不到 50% 成分股在 200 日均线上方——教科书级顶部背离。(2) 指数持平时 VIX 18.81（+5.50%）上升——波动率重新定价速度快于价格。(3) Meta 收入超预期但盘后跌 5%——beat and drop 扩散到 Mag 5。(4) 股市在历史新高时 BTC 跌 40%——最大风险规避背离。(5) 股市接近历史新高时 30Y 接近 5%——债市警告。(6) Nasdaq 持平时 Dow -0.57%——不确认。这些背离不能无限期共存。
